pages.title: High Elf
pages.text: Stacks on the shared $(l:races/elf)Elf$(/l) base. Built for spellcasting; weak with a sword.

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Arcane Affinity.$(/) +10% spell power across arcane, fire, frost, and healing.$(br2)$(bold)Magic Ward.$(/) Incoming magic damage reduced 15%.$(br2)$(bold)Fey Resilience.$(/) Harmful status effects wear off faster.$(br2)$(bold)Frail Strike.$(/) Melee damage -25%.
